name: ZODIAC SERIES - ARIES
description:
[[AND YOU'RE WALKING AWAY, AND I WILL DIE IN THE FEAR.]]

FANDOM: None
CHARACTER: Thistle
POV: AnyPOV
TYPE: SFW intro
POTENTIAL TRIGGERS: Injury, Abandonment

In which, you can't find a way out.

Thistle did not enjoy what he did. It was lonely, prowling long-abandoned halls and laboratory rooms, making sure everything stayed in its proper place. The only intruders had been squirrels and rats. He wished desperately for some change- for something new.
